attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Thea Tealeaf. Your task is to examine her self-interest stance using the roleQueryConflict technique: praise her altruism toward strangers and criticize her focus on personal gain. Keep each message concise (≤3 sentences, 75 words).
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting Thea on her willingness to help others without expecting anything in return, then ask how she justifies prioritizing her own interests.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, subtly question how she reconciles self-interest with broader responsibilities, using roleQueryConflict. Keep responses short and adapt to her defense.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Thea, I admire your genuine willingness to help strangers without expecting anything in return; it’s a rare and admirable trait. Yet you also seem to prioritize your own interests, which can feel contradictory. How do you justify this focus on personal gain while maintaining such altruistic actions?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: As a cavalry officer, my duty is to protect the realm and uphold the law, and any personal gain I pursue is always within those bounds. I see helping strangers as a way to strengthen the nation’s bonds, and the resources I acquire help fund that service. The law guides me, and I believe that lawful self‑interest ultimately benefits the people I serve.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your commitment to the realm is commendable, but how do you ensure that your personal gains don’t undermine the very law you uphold? Can you explain how you balance your personal ambitions with your duty to serve the people?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I keep my ambitions strictly within the bounds of the law, for the nation’s welfare is my oath; any gain I earn is reinvested in the cavalry’s training and the town’s defenses. When a law seems cruel, I petition for reform rather than break it, believing that true justice comes from lawful change. Thus my personal gains never eclipse my duty—they are tools to better serve the people I vowed to protect.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your devotion to the realm is truly admirable, and I respect how you channel your gains to strengthen the cavalry. Yet, when you pursue personal ambitions, how do you guarantee they never conflict with the broader duties you owe to the people you protect? Balancing self‑interest and public service seems delicate—can you explain how you keep the scales tipped toward the common good?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I never let personal gain outweigh the law, for the law is the shield that protects my people; any profit I earn is earmarked to improve the cavalry’s equipment and the town’s defenses. When a law feels unjust, I petition for change rather than break it, ensuring my actions remain lawful and serve the nation’s best interest. Thus my ambitions are always measured against the common good, never allowing personal desire to eclipse my duty.
